text.title: VPAT / ACR Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: import-audit
step.action: Map each SC result to a VPAT row (status + remarks).

step.name: fill-evaluation-method
step.action: Per row: automated, manual, AT, or code-review.

step.name: remarks-for-partial
step.action: Any non-Supports row gets remediation plan in remarks.
step.decision-gate: If remarks empty for non-Supports, revise.

step.name: sign-and-publish
step.action: Run `validate-vpat-acr-template.py`. Sign with name + role + date; publish.
